title: Replication code for "Industrialization, physical activity, and skeletal health: Evidence from a within-population study of the Indigenous peoples of Peninsular Malaysia"
description:
Replication code for the OA HeLP study of physical activity and bone health in the Orang Asli of Peninsular Malaysia (under review, Journal of Bone and Mineral Research). Bayesian regression (brms / Stan) estimating average exposure-response and marginal-effect functions for (1) physical activity to bone biomarkers and speed-of-sound under a mediator DAG, and (2) a community-level industrialization index to those outcomes via a two-stage cluster-honest estimator.

License note: the code is released under the MIT License; any data files distributed with the archive are released under CC-BY-4.0, subject to the OA HeLP data-governance terms.
